prompt_text:
### Demographics: 64-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 85.5 kg; Height 180.7 cm; BMI 26.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 127/60 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.3%; 9 months ago 9.2%; 6 months ago 8.9%; 3 months ago 8.7%; current 8.4%), FPG (12 months ago 198mg/dL; 9 months ago 201mg/dL; 6 months ago 236mg/dL; 3 months ago 224mg/dL; current 198mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 88.9kg; 9 months ago 88.1kg; 6 months ago 82.6kg; 3 months ago 81.9kg; current 85.5kg), Height (12 months ago 180.7cm; 9 months ago 180.7cm; 6 months ago 180.7cm; 3 months ago 180.7cm; current 180.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 27.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 27.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 26.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 128mmHg; 9 months ago 127mmHg; 6 months ago 129mmHg; 3 months ago 128mmHg; current 127mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 60mmHg; 9 months ago 60mmHg; 6 months ago 61mmHg; 3 months ago 60mmHg; current 60mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 15U/L; 9 months ago 17U/L; 6 months ago 9.0U/L; 3 months ago 7.0U/L; current 12U/L), AST (12 months ago 28U/L; 9 months ago 24U/L; 6 months ago 28U/L; 3 months ago 29U/L; current 27U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.4mg/dL; current 0.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; current 25mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 858mg/g; 9 months ago 662mg/g; 6 months ago 731mg/g; 3 months ago 1110mg/g; current 937mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 74mg/dL; 9 months ago 69mg/dL; 6 months ago 71mg/dL; 3 months ago 69mg/dL; current 72mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 47mg/dL; 9 months ago 46mg/dL; 6 months ago 44mg/dL; 3 months ago 44mg/dL; current 45mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 135mg/dL; 9 months ago 116mg/dL; 6 months ago 121mg/dL; 3 months ago 116mg/dL; current 128mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.2g/dL; 3 months ago 12.9g/dL; current 12.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
